## Release and compatibility

- [ ] Documentation is updated, or no documentation change is needed
- [ ] Breaking changes and migration steps are identified, or none apply
- [ ] No credentials, private data, local paths, device identifiers, or unprovenanced assets are included
- [ ] Every commit has a DCO `Signed-off-by` trailer

Security vulnerabilities must use private vulnerability reporting, not a pull request.
